arts.sum: Aleksandr Golovin (28) has seen his contract at AS Monaco extended until the summer of 2029, the Principality club confirmed on Friday. Golovin only extended his deal with Les Monégasques just…

arts.ttl: Official | Arnaud Pouille replaces Olivier Cloarec as Rennes president
arts.sum: Stade Rennais have announced a major update regarding their organizational chart. As previously reported by Ouest-France, the Ligue 1 side have appointed former Racing Club de Lens CEO Arnaud Pouille…
